_comment: Microsoft Graph application + Azure RBAC permissions for the Parser Function's user-assigned managed identity. Read-only by construction — the parser only needs to read the manifest blob and confirm a user exists in Entra. NO write permissions.

azureRoleAssignments._justification: Parser must read the manifest blob created by the reconciler. Scoped to the single container, not the storage account.
Parser unwraps the CMK to read the encrypted manifest blob. Scoped to the single key, not the vault.
